title: Apples ++
description: Adds many apple variants and crafts !
body:
## This mod adds more apples that you ever needed ! 
**Such as :**

- The comeback of the Enchanted Golden Apple's craft !
- Different tiers of apples, ranging from iron to netherite !
- Apples to make your life easier : mining and combat apples to boost your efficiency ! 
- A new wood and new tools !

_... And more !_

## Why did I made this mod ?
I was scrolling on Reddit when on **r/minecraftmemes** _(I think?)_ I saw this meme : 

![apple meme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/482b451fabd4d0be23bdc0503d0efac5487e8a1e.png)

I wondered if this will be real, so I actually did it ! 

> Note : This mod is still under construction, some items are useless because of crashes, and lack from A LOT of playtesting.
